2321070.name: Dungeons and Tiles
2321070.description:
Join the quest to clear the dungeons plagued by evil forces, in this Action Role-playing game, where part of your adventure is to complete building the paths in the dungeons to reach the exit and defeating the evil bosses, using a limited number of random tiles at your disposal.

Fight for loot and glory, to become a hero to be remembered in an epic adventure where everything is randomly generated every time you play it.
2321070.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
